subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! What thou hadst written was noted. Its contents were as fragrant flowers from the gardens of steadfastness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله آنچه مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گردید مضامین ریاحین ریاض ثبوت بود تا
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @degrees of faith; certitude
